$comment: REUSABLE PANEL SNIPPET (not a full dashboard). Drop into any dashboard's panels[] and fix up `id` + `gridPos`. Google-SRE error-budget burndown over mdk.jobs.completed. SLO = $slo_target success (define a `slo_target` dashboard variable, default 0.99). Plots error-budget CONSUMED = observed errors / (allowed-error-rate * total runs); 1.0 = budget exhausted. Pair with the 'remaining' gauge below (in the same file -- it's the second object in panels[]). Retune the SLO by changing $slo_target. Keyed only to mdk.jobs.completed (real #518 catalog metric). Movate palette (theme/palette.json). Mirrors panels id 30 + 31 in mdk-exec-summary.json.

burndown_panel.title: SLO error budget — burndown
burndown_panel.description: Error-budget consumed as a fraction of this period's allowance. SLO = $slo_target success. 0 = none used; 1.0 = budget exhausted (red line). Keyed to mdk.jobs.completed.

remaining_gauge.title: Error budget remaining
remaining_gauge.description: 1 - (error budget consumed), floored at 0. SLO target = $slo_target.
